description: ComputeResource (OBJ10) instances — schedulable hardware and cloud compute units. Stratum S2 (abstract capability) or S3 (active allocation). Target morphisms: OWNS, CAN_SCHEDULE. No source morphisms per ontology.

entries.label: Local Development CPU
entries.description: General-purpose CPU pool on the local developer workstation. Default compute for Wave-0 kernel and tooling. Not GPU-accelerated.

entries.label: NVIDIA H100 Cloud GPU
entries.description: High-throughput GPU compute for inference and training workloads. Sourced from industry GPU catalog (H100 SXM5 80GB). Targeted by CAN_SCHEDULE from Collider-class orchestration.

notes: Add entries per deployment target. Local CPU exemplar is minimal viable. Cloud GPU exemplars reference industry/compute.json for hardware specs; the instance adds scheduling context (who CAN_SCHEDULE it).
